criteria.finding: Integer winding is field-derived and robust, but the sector is seeded and is not identified with elementary electric charge.
criteria.label: Charge quantization

criteria.finding: A selected topological ansatz has an interior dimensionless scale minimum, but no physical mass or full CAT/EPT particle is established.
criteria.label: Electron rest energy (mass)

criteria.finding: Reversible phase, entropic monotone, and geometry clock channels are separated; no Zitterbewegung or physical-time identity is accepted.
criteria.label: de Broglie clock (Zitterbewegung)

criteria.finding: A trapped 3D minimizer and constrained 1D family exist, but the untrapped 3D control is not self-bound and the strongest bounded 3D member fails the frozen long-horizon localization gate.
criteria.label: Particle stability (Derrick escape)

criteria.finding: Spin and a Pauli-current magnetic moment are field-integrated controls; no emergent electron g factor or stable particle is established.
criteria.label: Magnetic moment and spin J

criteria.finding: The spinor changes sign after 2pi and returns after 4pi, but exchange statistics are not established.
criteria.label: Spin-1/2 statistics (720-degree return)

criteria.finding: A reduced opposite-sector model captures, annihilates, and transfers energy into radiation; full-PDE particle annihilation is not established.
criteria.label: Antimatter and annihilation

criteria.finding: Current geometric and M9.27 effective-scale candidate laws fail predictive gates; exact three-parameter interpolation has zero residual degrees of freedom. No predictive hierarchy is selected.
criteria.label: Lepton mass spectrum (mu, tau)

criteria.finding: No neutral localized CAT/EPT candidate is qualified.
criteria.label: Dark matter candidate

criteria.finding: No fractional-charge or color-sector model exists.
criteria.label: Quarks

criteria.finding: A charged-triplet graph binds and preserves ledgers, but no physical baryon or quark dynamics is established.
criteria.label: Baryons (p, n)

criteria.finding: A neutral-pair graph binds and preserves ledgers, but no physical meson or decay channel is established.
criteria.label: Mesons (pi, K)

criteria.finding: A regularized conservative kernel recovers the Coulomb-force asymptote, but no force between stable emergent charges is established.
criteria.label: Electric force (Coulomb 1/r)

criteria.finding: A regularized dipole kernel recovers the r^-4 force asymptote; a particle-level CAT/EPT interaction is not established.
criteria.label: Magnetic force

criteria.finding: No confinement or string-tension sector exists.
criteria.label: Strong force / confinement

criteria.finding: No chiral transition or decay sector exists.
criteria.label: Weak force

criteria.finding: A screened weak-field scalar metric responds to matter density and supplies lapse/proper-time probes; Einstein gravity, tensor dynamics, and physical coupling remain open.
criteria.label: Gravity

criteria.finding: Vacuum Maxwell propagation is qualified as a control, not derived as an emergent CAT/EPT result.
criteria.label: EM waves (Maxwell)

criteria.finding: No CAT/EPT reduction to a Klein-Gordon field equation is implemented.
criteria.label: Quantum wave equation (Klein-Gordon)

criteria.finding: A converged Coulomb-like radial standing-wave ladder is resolved; atomic structure from the full CAT/EPT PDE is not established.
criteria.label: Orbital quantization (atomic structure)
